The '''tortapo''' was a six-legged [[Turtle/Legends|tortoise]] that was one of the last surviving species on [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]], which had lost most of its wildlife due to heavily-polluted environments.<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> It was capable of retracting it's head into its shell.<ref name="TEGtD" />

{{Creature-stub}}
